id.description: The ID used to identify this component in Dash callbacks.

setProps.description:
Dash-assigned callback that should be called to report property changes
to Dash, to make them available for callbacks.

links.description: An array containing the links (first entry source, second entry target, third entry value)

colorPositions.description:
A map mapping the nodes to normalized 2D coordinates
of a 2D colormap

colormap.description: A string for the name of the colormap

nodeMap.description: A map containing the node/particle indices for each Sankey node

clickData.description:
Click data containing information about user interactions with the Sankey view
Structure: string with click details for logging
